name: UBA : Detect Persistent SSH session
notes: Detects SSH sessions that are active for more than 10 hours.
bb_references: BB:UBA : SSH Session Closed match in 10 hour(s) after BB:UBA : SSH Session Opened match with the same Username
db_fields_used: userName, destinationIP, sourceIP, SSH Process ID
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when none of BB:UBA : SSH Session Closed match in 10 hour(s) after BB:UBA : SSH Session Opened match with the same Username, Destination IP, Source IP, SSH Process ID (custom)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Detect Persistent SSH session on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when none of BB:UBA : SSH Session Closed match in 10 hour(s) after BB:UBA : SSH Session Opened match with the same Username, Destination IP, Source IP, SSH Process ID (custom)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Detect Persistent SSH session
